runtime.assumption_note: These runtime defaults are Phase 6 assumptions based on a torchvision-style EfficientNet training flow and should be verified against the original training code before production use.

missing_for_runtime: dependency validation for torch and torchvision in the serving environment
notes: This is the first crop model artifact added to the project.
The file is registered and discoverable by the current model registry.
Phase 6 adds an auto-matching torchvision runtime, but named inference still requires the real crop label map.
The checkpoint should be validated against the original training code before production deployment.
